title: cleomella obtusifolia
intro: Cleomella obtusifolia, also known as the smooth fringe-purcellia or fringe-purcellia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cleomella obtusifolia include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared in various herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
